_metadata.title: Operation Epic Fury — Day-by-Day Strike Data (OSINT Compilation)
_metadata.purpose: Bidirectional kinetic strike tracking: Iran outgoing + US/Israel strikes on Iran
sources: Wikipedia 2026 Iran war / 2026 Iranian strikes articles
_metadata.notes: Daily estimates triangulated from multiple sources. Where exact figures unavailable, ranges given. Cruise missiles exhausted by Day 5-6. Drone counts include OWA (one-way attack) types only.

iran_outgoing.description: Missiles and drones launched BY Iran at all targets

daily.notes: Opening salvo. Gulf News breakdown. ~170 BMs in first hours per ISW. Fars claims 500+ BMs total by Day 4.
key_events: First BM barrages within hours of Epic Fury launch
Iran retaliates at UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Saudi, Jordan, Oman
Jordan intercepts 49 drones/missiles including 13 BMs

daily.notes: Sustained high tempo. IAF downed 50 Iranian drones on this day alone. Tanker Skylight hit off Oman coast.
key_events: 6 US KIA from projectile penetrating Kuwait air defense
First commercial tanker attacked near Hormuz
Loitering munition strikes RAF Akrotiri, Cyprus
Oman: 2 drones hit Duqm Port

daily.notes: Gulf News breakdown. Cumulative by end of day: ~645 BMs, ~23 CMs, ~1400 drones.
key_events: Hezbollah enters war — rockets at northern Israel
Oil tanker MKD VYOM attacked off Oman (1 killed)
Oman: fuel tank at Duqm Port hit by drone

daily.notes: Gulf News breakdown. BM rate declining ~70% from Day 1. Shift toward drone-dominant ops.
key_events: All three proxy fronts now active (Hezbollah, Houthis, PMF)
Full regional proxy war declared by ICT SITREP
Cumulative ~585 BMs, ~1522 drones per FDD by Mar 5

daily.notes: Gulf News breakdown. Cruise missiles effectively exhausted. Sharp drop in drones too — launcher destruction taking effect.
key_events: First Israeli casualties: 2 soldiers wounded in Lebanon
20+ Iranian naval vessels destroyed
BM attacks down 70-85% from Day 1 per CENTCOM

daily.notes: Gulf News estimate (~5 BMs, ~30 drones). Cooper: BM attacks down 90%, drone attacks down 83%.
key_events: Cooper announces 90% BM decline, 83% drone decline
Iran navy effectively destroyed
CENTCOM: 3000+ targets struck in Iran

daily.notes: Slight uptick from Day 6 as Iran redeploys surviving launchers. IDF estimates 100-200 launchers remaining. 30+ ships destroyed.
key_events: Iran drone carrier (WWII-size) struck and on fire
6 BM barrages/day still aimed at Israel, most intercepted
IDF estimates 100-200 launchers remaining

daily.notes: UAE reports 16 BMs + 121 drones on this day. Dubai airport hit by drone. IDF strikes oil refineries for first time (Tondgouyan, Shahran).

saudi.notes: Shaybah targeted, Prince Sultan AB, Al-Kharj

israel.notes: 10 BM waves between Mar 6 3pm - Mar 7 3pm per Critical Threats

key_events: CENTCOM: 3000+ targets struck, 43 ships damaged/destroyed
IDF strikes oil refineries for first time
Israel estimates ~120 launchers remaining
Pezeshkian orders stop strikes on neighbors — IRGC ignores
Dubai airport hit by drone despite intercept
Saudi: 8 drones + 1 BM intercepted
7th US service member dies (wounded Mar 1)
Azerbaijan accuses Iran of drone attack on Nakhchivan

daily.notes: UAE daily: 17 BMs (16 intercepted, 1 sea), 117 drones (113 intercepted, 4 landed). Mojtaba Khamenei named Supreme Leader.
key_events: Mojtaba Khamenei named new Supreme Leader
Kuwait airport fuel tanks hit by drones
Bahrain desalination plant hit
Al-Kharj (Saudi) residential area hit: 2 killed, 12 injured
NATO intercepted BM over Turkish airspace (first time)
Qatar intercepts 6 BMs + 2 CMs

daily.notes: Estimated from trend + reported events. 9 BM waves at Israel (Mar 8 3pm - Mar 9 3pm). Cluster munition warheads confirmed on BMs hitting Israel.
key_events: Iran FM: no room for ceasefire while attacks continue
NATO intercepted 2nd BM over Turkish airspace (Gaziantep area)
Turkey deploys 6 F-16s + air defense to Northern Cyprus
Trump: 'war is very complete' then backtracks
Israel: wide-scale strikes on Tehran, Isfahan, southern Iran
11+ killed in Israel total from Iranian missiles since war start
Bahrain: Iranian drone struck Sitra, 32 injured
Saudi intercepts 2 drones at Shaybah
BMs with cluster munition warheads hit 7 locations in Israel

daily.notes: Estimated — today. Near exhaustion of mobile launchers. IDF striking rocket engine production + long-range BM launch sites.
key_events: Oil surges toward $120/bbl
France deploying 8 frigates + 2 amphibious carriers
IDF struck rocket engine production + long-range BM launch sites
Heavy explosions across Tehran
Iran FM Araghchi threatens to destroy HIMARS
Oman sultan congratulates Mojtaba Khamenei
IAEA: enriched uranium stockpile intact despite strikes
Bahrain: Iranian drone struck residential area, 32 civilians injured

cumulative_totals.notes: Sum of daily estimates. Fars/Pentagon claimed 500+ BMs and 2000+ drones by Day 4. FDD tracked 585 BMs + 1522 drones by Day 6. Our total reflects continued launches Days 7-11.

cumulative_by_target.source: Gulf state defense ministries via FDD/Reuters Mar 8

saudi.notes: Less comprehensive reporting. Documented: Shaybah, Prince Sultan AB, Al-Kharj, Berri, Riyadh targeted. Intercepted 23 drones + 3 missiles in one reported batch.

israel.notes: ~40% of BMs initially, declining to ~20% by Day 5+. 11+ killed total.

oman.notes: Duqm Port hit twice, 2 tankers attacked, generally neutral

cyprus.notes: RAF Akrotiri hit by loitering munition Mar 1

us_israel_strikes_on_iran.description: US (Epic Fury) + Israel (Roaring Lion) strikes ON Iranian territory and assets

daily.targets_struck_note: 1500+ strikes in first 24h. Double scale of 2003 Shock & Awe.
key_targets: IRGC HQ, air defense sites, command nodes
9 naval vessels destroyed including drone carrier Shahid Bagheri

daily.targets_struck_note: 1700 targets in first 72h confirmed by Fox/CENTCOM
key_targets: B-2 → B-1 → B-52 bomber escalation confirms air superiority
IAF: 1600 strike sorties, 4000+ munitions (equals entire June 2025 war)
Satellite imagery: strikes on Imam Ali Missile Base
Iran navy effectively destroyed — no surface combatants operational
SNSC HQ and Expediency Council building destroyed
3 US F-15s lost to friendly fire (Kuwaiti F/A-18)
Drone carrier struck and on fire
Esfahan Missile Complex underground facilities struck

daily.idf_targets_note: IDF struck 300+ targets in Iran in past 2 days
key_targets: IDF struck oil refineries for first time (Tondgouyan, Shahran)
Continued strikes on missile storage and launchers
Kuwait airport fuel tanks hit (by Iran, not US strike)
Israel: wide-scale strikes on Tehran, Isfahan, southern Iran
IDF struck rocket engine production facilities

us.kia_timeline: 6 on Mar 1-2 (Kuwait, projectile penetrated air defense), 7th died Mar 7 from wounds

israel.notes: Civilian + military, from Iranian BMs since war start. Cluster munition warheads confirmed.

iran_military.killed_est_note: As of Mar 4. Likely much higher by Mar 10 but no updated figures.

iran_civilian.killed_est_note: Iranian Red Crescent figure from Day 1 only. No updated cumulative figure available.
